---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that's broken or incorrect
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is (e.g. wrong calculation, broken link, typo, inconsistent doc).

## Location
- File(s) or section(s) affected (e.g. `docs/ROSCA_SERVICE.md`, README Ideas section).

## Expected behavior
What should happen or what the content should say.

## Actual behavior
What currently happens or what the content says now.

## Additional context
Any other details, screenshots, or references that help.
